title: Best Winter Activities in Switzerland for Families
excerpt: From tobogganing to Christmas markets, discover the best family-friendly winter experiences across Switzerland.
author: Emma Clarke
content:
Switzerland transforms into a winter wonderland from December to February. Here are the best family activities that go beyond just skiing.

## Tobogganing at Faulhorn
Europe's longest toboggan run at 15km is an absolute blast for the whole family. Take the gondola to First and hike to Faulhorn, then enjoy an incredible downhill ride to Grindelwald.

## Basel Christmas Market
Over 180 stalls of handcrafted gifts, Swiss treats, and mulled wine. The illuminated Münsterplatz is pure magic for kids and adults alike.

## Ice Skating in Davos
Europe's largest natural ice rink offers family skating under the stars. Affordable and unforgettable.

## Swiss Museum of Transport, Lucerne
A perfect rainy day activity. Over 3,000 exhibits keep kids entertained for hours. The planetarium and chocolate adventure are highlights.

## Snowshoe Hiking in the Engadin
Gentle guided snowshoe tours are suitable for kids aged 8+. The silence of the snowy landscape is a unique experience.

## Leukerbad Thermal Baths
Warm up in natural hot springs with the whole family. Kids love the outdoor pools surrounded by snowy peaks.

**Budget tip:** Many Swiss ski resorts offer free lift passes for children under 6, and the SBB Family Card gives kids free travel with a parent.
